ext.description: AI-Assisted Java EE Support Extinction for Tomcat
command.deploy.title: Deploy
command.start.title: Tomcat: Start
command.stop.title: Tomcat: Stop
command.clean.title: Tomcat: Clean
config.title: Tomcat
config.language.description: UI language for this extension. On first run, 'auto' follows VS Code's display language (zh → Chinese, others → English).
config.ai.provider.description: AI provider for log explanations. Use 'local' for a self-hosted or on-device endpoint; other values expect a compatible HTTP endpoint you configure.
config.ai.endpoint.description: Full HTTP(s) endpoint for chat/completion requests (e.g., http://localhost:11434/api/chat or provider-specific URL).
config.ai.model.description: Model identifier to send to the configured AI endpoint (e.g., qwen, glm, deepseek-chat, llama3).
config.ai.apiKey.description: Optional API key or token sent as Bearer Authorization when calling the AI endpoint. Stored in settings.json.
config.ai.localStartCommand.description: Command to launch the local AI service when the endpoint is unreachable.
config.logEncoding.description: Encoding for Tomcat logs. This setting is used to read the logs and should match the encoding used by Tomcat. If you are unsure, use 'utf8'.
config.logLevel.description: Minimum log level to display. Messages at or above this level will be shown.
config.showTimestamp.description: Whether to include timestamps in log messages.
config.protectedWebApps.description: List of web applications to keep when cleaning Apache Tomcat.
config.autoDeployMode.description: Select the auto deployment mode. 'On Save' deploys when you save any file. 'On Shortcut' deploys when you press Ctrl+S or Cmd+S.
config.autoDeployBuildType.description: Select the default build type for auto deployment.
config.browser.description: Select your preferred browser to launch the app. Note that Firefox and Safari do not support the Chrome Debug Protocol, and automation is not supported in these browsers.
config.port.description: The port number for the Tomcat server, allowed range is 1024-49151.
config.autoReloadBrowser.description: Whether to automatically reload the browser after deployment. Disable this option if having issues with the browser reloading.
config.base.description: Path to CATALINA_BASE (conf/webapps/logs). If not set, falls back to tomcat.home.
config.home.description: The path to the Apache Tomcat installation. If not set, the extension will try to find the Tomcat installation automatically.
config.javaHome.description: The path to the JDK installation. If not set, the extension will try to find the JDK automatically.
